title: maytenus bupleuroides
intro: Maytenus bupleuroides, also known as Puesto, is a plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially treating cancer. Maytenus bupleuroides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
